JUDGE PRO TEM:PAUL PERDUE ; CLERK: BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott I. Bassin, 753-5245, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Anthony Covarrubio, 286-2876, defendant appearing in propria persona

The Court received a late opposition to the motion, which was objected to by Mr. Covarrubio, and withdrawn by Mr. Bassin. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ANTHONY COVARRUBIO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR 6213
